headline: Is Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EQIX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Equinix, Inc. on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EQIX. Equinix, Inc.’s share was trading at $1,103.97 as of April 20th. EQIX’s trailing and forward P/E were 80.23 and 67.11 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Equinix, Inc. shortens […]
